title: Steering Claude Code: CLAUDE.md 文件、skills、hooks、rules、subagents 等
preview: Claude is built to work the way you work, and in Claude Code you can customize it.

blocks.english: Claude is built to work the way you work, and in Claude Code you can customize it.
blocks.chinese: Claude 的设计初衷是按照你的方式工作，而在 Claude Code 中你可以对它进行自定义。

blocks.english: There are seven methods for instructing Claude's behavior: CLAUDE.md files, rules, **skills**, **subagents**, **hooks**, output styles, and appending the system prompt.
blocks.chinese: 有七种方法可以指导 Claude 的行为：CLAUDE.md 文件、rules、**skills**、**subagents**、**hooks**、output styles 以及追加 system prompt。

blocks.english: Each method controls:
blocks.chinese: 每种方法控制：

blocks.english: - When an instruction loads into context;
blocks.chinese: - 指令何时加载到上下文中；

blocks.english: - Whether it persists through long sessions (compaction behavior); and
blocks.chinese: - 是否在长时间会话中保持存在（compaction 行为）；以及

blocks.english: - How much authority it carries.
blocks.chinese: - 指令携带多大的权限权重。

blocks.english: The table below provides a quick summary of key differences across each method while the post provides additional detail and decision framework for determining where each of your Claude instructions belongs.
blocks.chinese: 下表对各方法的关键差异进行了快速概览，而本文将提供更详细的说明和决策框架，帮助你确定每条 Claude 指令应该放在哪里。

blocks.english: The seven methods for delivering instructions
blocks.chinese: 传递指令的七种方法

blocks.english: CLAUDE.md files
blocks.chinese: CLAUDE.md 文件

blocks.english: CLAUDE.md is a markdown file at the root of your project. It loads into context at session start and stays there for the entire session.
blocks.chinese: CLAUDE.md 是项目根目录下的一个 markdown 文件。它在会话开始时加载到上下文中，并在整个会话期间保持存在。

blocks.english: Build commands, directory layout, monorepo structure, coding conventions, and team norms all fit naturally here.
blocks.chinese: 构建命令、目录布局、monorepo 结构、编码规范和团队惯例都非常适合放在这里。

blocks.english: There are two types, and they load differently:
blocks.chinese: 有两种类型，加载方式不同：

blocks.english: - **Always loaded:** The first type is a root CLAUDE.md file, either in a shared repository and/or saved locally for your personal preferences specific to a project. All these files load at session start, and won't get lost or degraded across long sessions. When Claude Code compacts the conversation, it re-reads these files.
blocks.chinese: - **始终加载：** 第一种是根目录的 CLAUDE.md 文件，可以位于共享仓库中，也可以是本地保存的针对特定项目的个人偏好。所有这些文件在会话开始时加载，在长时间会话中不会丢失或降级。当 Claude Code 压缩对话时，会重新读取这些文件。

blocks.english: - **On-demand:** CLAUDE.md files in subdirectories below the folder where you initialized the session. For example, `app/api/CLAUDE.md` loads when Claude reads a file under `app/api`, not at session start. It shares the compaction behavior of path-scoped rules: gone until that subdirectory is touched again. All subdirectory CLAUDE.md files below the cwd load when Claude reads a file within that directory.
blocks.chinese: - **按需加载：** 位于会话初始化目录下方子目录中的 CLAUDE.md 文件。例如，`app/api/CLAUDE.md` 仅在 Claude 读取 `app/api` 下的文件时才加载，而非在会话开始时。它与路径范围限定的 rules 共享 compaction 行为：在该子目录再次被访问之前不会加载。cwd 下的所有子目录 CLAUDE.md 文件在 Claude 读取该目录中的文件时加载。

blocks.english: In a shared repository, CLAUDE.md grows the way any unowned config file does: every team appends its own instructions and nothing gets deleted. The cost compounds at scale.
blocks.chinese: 在共享仓库中，CLAUDE.md 会像任何无归属的配置文件一样不断增长：每个团队都追加自己的指令，没有任何内容被删除。成本会随规模累积。

blocks.english: Every line loads into every session for every engineer working in the repo, whether it's relevant to their task or not. This consumes tokens and dilutes adherence to the instructions that actually matter. As the file grows, push team-specific conventions into path-scoped rules and procedures into skills, where they load only when relevant.
blocks.chinese: 每一行都会加载到在该仓库工作的每位工程师的每个会话中，无论是否与其任务相关。这会消耗 token 并稀释对真正重要指令的遵循度。随着文件增长，应将团队特定的惯例推入路径范围限定的 rules，将流程推入 skills，使其仅在相关时加载。

blocks.english: **Tip:** Keep CLAUDE.md under 200 lines, give it an owner, and review changes to it like code. Think of this file as giving Claude an overview of your codebase, or as an index pointing to other files where Claude can find more information as needed.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 将 CLAUDE.md 保持在 200 行以内，指定负责人，并像审查代码一样审查对其的更改。将此文件视为给 Claude 提供代码库概览，或作为指向其他文件的索引，让 Claude 可以在需要时找到更多信息。

blocks.english: In monorepos, give each team's directory its own subdirectory CLAUDE.md so teams only load their own conventions, and developers can use the `claudeMdExcludes` setting to skip files from teams whose code they never touch.
blocks.chinese: 在 monorepo 中，为每个团队的目录提供自己的子目录 CLAUDE.md，这样团队只加载自己的惯例，开发者可以使用 `claudeMdExcludes` 设置来跳过从未接触的团队的文件。

blocks.english: For standards that must apply to every repository in the organization — security policies, compliance requirements — a centrally managed CLAUDE.md can be deployed to developer machines via MDM or config management, and it can't be excluded by individual settings.
blocks.chinese: 对于必须应用于组织中每个仓库的标准——安全策略、合规要求——可以通过 MDM 或配置管理将集中管理的 CLAUDE.md 部署到开发者机器上，且不能被个人设置排除。

blocks.english: More on setting up CLAUDE.md in our blog post, [CLAUDE.md files: Customizing Claude Code for your codebase](https://claude.com/blog/claude-md).
blocks.chinese: 更多关于设置 CLAUDE.md 的内容，请参阅我们的博文 [CLAUDE.md 文件：为你的代码库自定义 Claude Code](https://claude.com/blog/claude-md)。

blocks.english: Rules are markdown files in `.claude/rules/` that give Claude specific constraints or conventions.
blocks.chinese: Rules 是位于 `.claude/rules/` 中的 markdown 文件，用于给 Claude 提供特定的约束或惯例。

blocks.english: Unscoped rules behave like CLAUDE.md in that they are always loaded at session start and get re-injected on compaction. This can waste tokens by loading context even when it's not relevant for the task at hand.
blocks.chinese: 未限定范围的 rules 与 CLAUDE.md 类似，总是在会话开始时加载，并在 compaction 时重新注入。这可能会浪费 token，因为即使与当前任务无关，也会加载上下文。

blocks.english: Path-scoped rules allow you to load rule instructions only when they are relevant by adding a `paths` field that controls when they load.
blocks.chinese: 路径范围限定的 rules 允许你仅在相关时加载 rule 指令，通过添加 `paths` 字段来控制加载时机。

blocks.english: For example: a rule scoped to `src/api/**` stays out of context during a docs-only session. It would only be loaded whenever Claude reads files within that `src/api/` directory.
blocks.chinese: 例如：一个限定在 `src/api/**` 的 rule 在纯文档会话期间不会进入上下文。仅当 Claude 读取该 `src/api/` 目录中的文件时才会加载。

blocks.english: Here's what that looks like:
blocks.chinese: 如下所示：

blocks.english: **Tip:** A file-specific constraint, like "migrations are append-only," fits best as a rule placed in your `paths:` frontmatter. Reach for a path scoped rule over a nested CLAUDE.md file when the instruction regards a cross-cutting concern or file that appears in multiple (but not all) corners of the codebase.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 特定于文件的约束，如"migration 只能追加"，最适合放在 `paths:` frontmatter 中的 rule。当指令涉及横切关注点或出现在代码库多个（但非全部）角落的文件时，优先使用路径范围限定的 rule 而非嵌套的 CLAUDE.md 文件。

blocks.english: Skills live in `.claude/skills/` as folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically. Each skill has a SKILL.md file with a name, description, and body.
blocks.chinese: Skills 位于 `.claude/skills/` 中，作为 Claude 动态加载的指令、脚本和资源文件夹。每个 skill 都有一个包含名称、描述和正文的 SKILL.md 文件。

blocks.english: Only the name and description load at session start; the full body loads when Claude invokes the skill, either through a slash command (`/code-review`) or by auto-matching the task.
blocks.chinese: 会话开始时仅加载名称和描述；当 Claude 通过斜杠命令（`/code-review`）或自动匹配任务调用 skill 时，才加载完整内容。

blocks.english: Skills are triggered via your system prompt.
blocks.chinese: Skills 通过你的 system prompt 触发。

blocks.english: For example, `/code-review` is a built-in skill that reviews your current diff and reports its findings without editing files. The skill defines the playbook so Claude follows the same structured approach every time you invoke it.
blocks.chinese: 例如，`/code-review` 是一个内置 skill，它审查你当前的 diff 并报告发现，而不编辑文件。skill 定义了操作手册，因此每次调用时 Claude 都遵循相同的结构化方法。

blocks.english: On compaction, Claude Code re-injects invoked skills up to a total budget across all invoked skills. If you've invoked many skills during a session, the oldest ones drop first.
blocks.chinese: Compaction 时，Claude Code 在所有被调用 skills 的总预算范围内重新注入被调用的 skills。如果你在会话中调用了多个 skills，最旧的会优先被丢弃。

blocks.english: **Tip:** Instructions that are procedural, like deploy workflows, release checklists, or review processes, belong in a skill rather than in CLAUDE.md.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 流程化的指令，如部署工作流、发布检查清单或审查流程，应放在 skill 中而非 CLAUDE.md 中。

blocks.english: Claude Code ships with skills, but you can also write your own custom skills. Our [complete guide to building skills for Claude](https://claude.com/blog/claude-code-skills) shows you how.
blocks.chinese: Claude Code 自带 skills，但你也可以编写自己的自定义 skills。我们的 [Claude skills 构建完整指南](https://claude.com/blog/claude-code-skills) 会告诉你怎么做。

blocks.english: Subagents are markdown files in `.claude/agents/` that define isolated assistants for specific side tasks. Each file uses YAML frontmatter (name, description, plus optional fields for model and tool access) followed by a body that becomes that subagent's system prompt.
blocks.chinese: Subagents 是位于 `.claude/agents/` 中的 markdown 文件，用于定义特定辅助任务的隔离助手。每个文件使用 YAML frontmatter（名称、描述，以及模型和工具访问的可选字段），后跟作为该 subagent system prompt 的正文。

blocks.english: Subagents are similar to skills in that the name, description, and tool list load at session start, but the larger context within the body of the agent doesn't auto-invoke. Claude calls them via the Agent tool, passing in a prompt string.
blocks.chinese: Subagents 与 skills 类似，名称、描述和工具列表在会话开始时加载，但 agent 正文中的较大上下文不会自动调用。Claude 通过 Agent 工具调用它们，传入一个 prompt 字符串。

blocks.english: Not only does the larger instructional context within the body of the subagent not auto-invoke, it never enters the parent conversation at all.
blocks.chinese: Subagent 正文中的较大指令上下文不仅不会自动调用，而且永远不会进入父对话。

blocks.english: The subagent then runs in its own fresh context window, and the only thing that returns to your main session is the subagent's final message (often the aggregated result of many subtasks) plus metadata.
blocks.chinese: Subagent 随后在自己全新的上下文窗口中运行，唯一返回到你主会话的是 subagent 的最终消息（通常是多个子任务的聚合结果）加元数据。

blocks.english: This pattern scales: subagents can nest up to five levels deep, and dynamic workflows orchestrate tens to hundreds of background agents without requiring you to specify each detail of the subagent architecture. The orchestration plan and intermediate results live in script variables rather than in Claude's context window, which enables scale without losing instructional fidelity.
blocks.chinese: 这种模式可扩展：subagents 最多可以嵌套五层深，动态工作流可以编排数十到数百个后台 agent，而无需你指定 subagent 架构的每个细节。编排计划和中间结果存在于脚本变量中，而非 Claude 的上下文窗口中，这使得在不丢失指令保真度的情况下实现规模化成为可能。

blocks.english: **Tip:** That isolation is one of the main reasons to reach for a subagent instead of a skill. Use a subagent when a side task like deep search, a log analysis pass, or a dependency audit would clutter your main conversation with intermediate results you won't reference again. Use a skill when you want the procedure to play out inside the main thread so you can see and steer each step.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 这种隔离性是选择 subagent 而非 skill 的主要原因之一。当深度搜索、日志分析或依赖审计等辅助任务会使你的主对话充斥着你不会再引用的中间结果时，使用 subagent。当你希望流程在主线程中展开以便你能看到并引导每一步时，使用 skill。

blocks.english: Hooks are user-defined commands, HTTP endpoints, or LLM prompts that provide more deterministic control over Claude's behavior by firing on specific events in Claude's lifecycle like file edits, tool calls, or session start.
blocks.chinese: Hooks 是用户定义的命令、HTTP 端点或 LLM prompt，通过在 Claude 生命周期的特定事件（如文件编辑、工具调用或会话开始）上触发，为 Claude 的行为提供更确定性的控制。

blocks.english: You register hooks in settings.json, managed policy settings, or skill/agent frontmatter.
blocks.chinese: 你在 settings.json、托管策略设置或 skill/agent frontmatter 中注册 hooks。

blocks.english: There are several types of hooks: `command`, `HTTP`, `mcp_tool`, `prompt`, and `agent`. All hooks are deterministically triggered. The first three execute deterministically while the latter two, `prompt` and `agent`, use Claude's judgment rather than a set of rules to determine the output.
blocks.chinese: Hooks 有几种类型：`command`、`HTTP`、`mcp_tool`、`prompt` 和 `agent`。所有 hooks 都是确定性触发的。前三种确定性执行，而后两种——`prompt` 和 `agent`——使用 Claude 的判断而非一组规则来确定输出。

blocks.english: Hooks have low context costs because the configuration or instruction lives outside the main context window. The harness runs the handler (command, http, mcp_tool) or makes model calls with separate windows (prompt, agent) depending on the hook type.
blocks.chinese: Hooks 的上下文成本很低，因为配置或指令存在于主上下文窗口之外。工具框架运行处理程序（command、http、mcp_tool）或使用独立窗口进行模型调用（prompt、agent），具体取决于 hook 类型。

blocks.english: Some hooks may have the output saved to the main context window. For example, a blocking hook's standard error is saved within context so Claude knows why the call was denied.
blocks.chinese: 某些 hooks 可能会将输出保存到主上下文窗口。例如，阻断 hook 的标准错误会保存在上下文中，以便 Claude 知道调用被拒绝的原因。

blocks.english: But most hooks won't have the output saved to the main window unless the configuration explicitly returns it. If you backed up your chat history into another file for later reference before compaction using the PreCompact event, Claude wouldn't know which file had the chat history saved.
blocks.chinese: 但大多数 hooks 不会将输出保存到主窗口，除非配置明确返回。如果你使用 PreCompact 事件在 compaction 之前将聊天记录备份到另一个文件中，Claude 不会知道哪个文件保存了聊天记录。

blocks.english: This makes these hook types fundamentally different from CLAUDE.md, rules, and skills. You can learn more in our post [how to configure hooks](https://claude.com/blog/hooks-guide).
blocks.chinese: 这使得这些 hook 类型与 CLAUDE.md、rules 和 skills 有本质区别。你可以在我们的博文 [如何配置 hooks](https://claude.com/blog/hooks-guide) 中了解更多信息。

blocks.english: **Tip:** Use hooks for anything that should happen deterministically: running linters after edits, posting to Slack on completion, or blocking specific commands before they execute. A PreToolUse hook can inspect any tool call and exit code 2 to deny it. They have low context cost because they are code that the harness runs rather than instructions to Claude that get loaded into context.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 对任何需要确定性发生的事情使用 hooks：编辑后运行 linter、完成后发布到 Slack，或在执行前阻断特定命令。PreToolUse hook 可以检查任何工具调用并以退出码 2 拒绝它。它们的上下文成本很低，因为它们是工具框架运行的代码，而非加载到上下文中的 Claude 指令。

blocks.english: Output styles are files in `.claude/output-styles/` that inject instructions into the system prompt. They never get compacted, load at the start of every session, and are cached after the first request within a session, meaning they have a moderate context cost.
blocks.chinese: Output styles 是位于 `.claude/output-styles/` 中的文件，将指令注入 system prompt。它们永不压缩，在每个会话开始时加载，并在会话中首次请求后被缓存，这意味着它们具有中等的上下文成本。

blocks.english: Because they sit in the system prompt, output styles carry the highest instruction-following weight of any method that we've covered so far and should be used judiciously.
blocks.chinese: 因为它们位于 system prompt 中，output styles 携带了我们目前介绍的所有方法中最高的指令遵循权重，应谨慎使用。

blocks.english: Changes to the output style will replace the default output style (unless you set `keep-coding-instructions: true` in the style's frontmatter).
blocks.chinese: 更改 output style 将替换默认的 output style（除非你在 style 的 frontmatter 中设置了 `keep-coding-instructions: true`）。

blocks.english: In Claude Code, this would remove instructions that tell Claude it is helping users with software engineering tasks and contains other critical default instructions such as:
blocks.chinese: 在 Claude Code 中，这将移除告诉 Claude 它正在帮助用户完成软件工程任务的指令，以及其他关键的默认指令，例如：

blocks.english: - How to scope changes;
blocks.chinese: - 如何界定变更范围；

blocks.english: - When to add or omit code comments;
blocks.chinese: - 何时添加或省略代码注释；

blocks.english: - What to do about security concerns; and
blocks.chinese: - 如何处理安全问题；以及

blocks.english: - Verification habits like running tests before declaring work complete.
blocks.chinese: - 验证习惯，如在声明工作完成前运行测试。

blocks.english: By default, a custom output style drops all of this and Claude Code becomes more of a general assistant than a software engineer assistant.
blocks.chinese: 默认情况下，自定义 output style 会丢弃所有这些，Claude Code 更像是通用助手而非软件工程师助手。

blocks.english: **Tip:** Before writing a custom output style, check the built-in styles. Proactive, Explanatory, and Learning cover the most common needs (autonomy, teaching mode, collaborative coding) without you having to maintain a style file.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 在编写自定义 output style 之前，检查内置 styles。Proactive、Explanatory 和 Learning 覆盖了最常见的需求（自主性、教学模式、协作编码），无需你维护 style 文件。

blocks.english: Appending the system prompt
blocks.chinese: 追加 system prompt

blocks.english: An alternative to modifying output styles is the `append-system-prompt` flag. Whereas modifying output style files can have large, unintended changes to Claude's behavior, the append flag is only additive to the original system prompt. It doesn't modify Claude's role; it just adds instructions to its default role.
blocks.chinese: 修改 output styles 的替代方案是 `append-system-prompt` flag。修改 output style 文件可能对 Claude 的行为产生大的、非预期的更改，而 append flag 仅对原始 system prompt 进行追加。它不修改 Claude 的角色；只是向其默认角色添加指令。

blocks.english: It is also passed at invocation time, and only applies to that invocation, rather than persisted as a file across sessions.
blocks.chinese: 它也是在调用时传递的，仅适用于该次调用，而非作为文件跨会话持久化。

blocks.english: Appending the system prompt can have a higher context cost compared to other methods of passing instructions. It increases input tokens, though prompt caching reduces this cost after the first request in a session. Instructing Claude to use a more verbose or longer style also increases output tokens.
blocks.chinese: 追加 system prompt 与其他传递指令的方法相比可能具有更高的上下文成本。它增加了输入 token，不过 prompt caching 在会话中首次请求后会降低此成本。指示 Claude 使用更冗长或更长的风格也会增加输出 token。

blocks.english: **Tip:** Appending the system prompt is best for adding specific coding standards, output formatting, or domain-specific knowledge. Keep in mind that appending the system prompt has diminishing returns for adherence. Generally, the more instructions you provide using this method, the less strictly Claude will follow them, particularly if any contradict.
blocks.chinese: **提示：** 追加 system prompt 最适合添加特定的编码标准、输出格式或领域特定知识。请记住，追加 system prompt 对遵循度的边际收益递减。通常，使用此方法提供的指令越多，Claude 遵循它们的严格程度就越低，尤其是当指令之间存在矛盾时。

blocks.english: Quick tips for Claude Code customization
blocks.chinese: Claude Code 自定义快速技巧

blocks.english: If you find yourself doing one of the following, you may want to consider an alternative location for your instructions:
blocks.chinese: 如果你发现自己正在做以下事情之一，可能需要考虑将指令放在其他位置：

blocks.english: **"Every time X, always do Y" in CLAUDE.md.** If the behavior should happen reliably, like running prettier after every edit or posting to Slack on completion, use a hook in settings.json instead. The model choosing to run a formatter is different from the formatter running automatically.
blocks.chinese: **"每次 X 时，总是做 Y"放在 CLAUDE.md 中。** 如果行为需要可靠地发生，如每次编辑后运行 prettier 或完成后发布到 Slack，请改用 settings.json 中的 hook。模型选择运行格式化程序与格式化程序自动运行是不同的。

blocks.english: **"Never do this" in CLAUDE.md.** When there's something that absolutely must not happen, an instruction is the wrong tool. Claude will follow the instruction most of the time, but when under pressure, in a long session or an ambiguous situation, or due to a prompt injection in a file accessed as part of the task, the model can fail to follow a prompted rule. A real guardrail needs to be deterministic, and the enforcement methods are hooks and permissions. A PreToolUse hook can inspect a call and exit with code 2 to block it. Managed settings go further: they are admin-deployed, cannot be overridden by a user's local config, and are the only way to enforce a deterministic, organization-wide guardrail.
blocks.chinese: **"永远不要这样做"放在 CLAUDE.md 中。** 当某些事情绝对不能发生时，指令是错误的工具。Claude 大多数时候会遵循指令，但在压力下、在长时间会话或模糊情况下，或由于任务中访问的文件中的 prompt 注入，模型可能无法遵循 prompt 规则。真正的防护栏需要是确定性的，执行方法是 hooks 和权限。PreToolUse hook 可以检查调用并以退出码 2 阻断它。托管设置更进一步：它们由管理员部署，不能被用户的本地配置覆盖，是执行确定性、组织范围防护栏的唯一方式。

blocks.english: **A 30-line procedure in CLAUDE.md.** Procedures belong in skills. CLAUDE.md is for facts Claude should hold all the time: build commands, monorepo layout, team conventions. A deployment runbook or a security review checklist should live in `.claude/skills/`, where the body loads only when invoked.
blocks.chinese: **CLAUDE.md 中 30 行的流程。** 流程应放在 skills 中。CLAUDE.md 用于 Claude 始终应持有的事实：构建命令、monorepo 布局、团队惯例。部署手册或安全审查检查清单应放在 `.claude/skills/` 中，正文仅在调用时加载。

blocks.english: **An API-specific rule without paths.** If a rule only applies to `src/api/**`, scoping it with `paths:` keeps it out of context during unrelated work. An unscoped rule is mechanically identical to putting the content in CLAUDE.md: always loaded, always costing tokens.
blocks.chinese: **没有 paths 的 API 特定 rule。** 如果 rule 仅适用于 `src/api/**`，使用 `paths:` 限定范围可在不相关工作期间将其排除在上下文之外。未限定范围的 rule 在机制上与将内容放在 CLAUDE.md 中相同：始终加载，始终消耗 token。

blocks.english: **Writing personal preferences to a project-level CLAUDE.md file.** All file-based methods have a user-level counterpart loaded for every Claude Code session regardless of which repo you're in. Use local files for personal preferences (always use semantic commit messages). Keep project-level files for preferences that are team-wide but specific to a given codebase.
blocks.chinese: **将个人偏好写入项目级 CLAUDE.md 文件。** 所有基于文件的方法都有用户级对应版本，无论你在哪个仓库中都会为每个 Claude Code 会话加载。使用本地文件存放个人偏好（始终使用语义化提交消息）。保留项目级文件用于团队范围但特定于给定代码库的偏好。

blocks.english: Getting started
blocks.chinese: 开始使用

blocks.english: You can find more tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions, in our [best practices for Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/best-practices) documentation.
blocks.chinese: 你可以在我们的 [Claude Code 最佳实践](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/best-practices) 文档中找到更多充分利用 Claude Code 的技巧和模式，从配置环境到跨并行会话扩展。

blocks.english: Once you have a few of these working, you can bundle many of them (skills, subagents, hooks, output styles) as a plugin to share a coherent setup across teammates or projects.
blocks.chinese: 一旦你让其中一些发挥作用，你可以将它们中的许多（skills、subagents、hooks、output styles）打包为插件，在团队成员或项目之间共享一致的配置。
